PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?opponentTeam ?record WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P550 wd:Q17515651 ;(wdt:P1295 | wdt:P1296) wd:Q182298 ; wdt:P1473 ?homeScore ; wdt:P1474 ?awayScore .
  FILTER((wdt:P1295 = wd:Q182298 && ?awayScore - ?homeScore = 7) ||(wdt:P1296 = wd:Q182298 && ?homeScore - ?awayScore = 7))
  BIND(IF(wdt:P1295 = wd:Q182298 , wdt:P1296 , wdt:P1295) AS ?opponentTeam)
  ?opponentSeason wdt:P1423 ?opponentTeam ; wdt:P550 wd:Q5174271 ; wdt:P487 ?record .
  FILTER(LANG(?record) = 'en')
}
